Docs

Reference Map

Curated guide to the public Northroot docs that remain canonical in source.

The site provides a reading path. The canonical references remain in source.

ReferenceSource
Core Specificationdocs/reference/spec.md
Canonicalizationdocs/reference/canonicalization.md
Event Modeldocs/reference/events.md
Journal Formatdocs/reference/format.md

Implementation Notes

When a source reference changes, update the source first. Then update this site only if the public explanation needs to change.

Operational Lessons

Documentation stays coherent when source authority is explicit.

Source

Explanations live here. Canonical contracts remain in source.
